description_long: This object is an abstract, angular representation of a human adult, composed of sharp, faceted planes and elongated forms. The figure is constructed from a combination of metallic and possibly composite materials, with a predominantly steel-gray and rust-brown color palette. The limbs and torso are highly stylized, with exaggerated, geometric proportions and minimal anatomical detail. The surface finish is smooth and reflective in some areas, with a hard, metallic sheen. There are no discernible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, emphasizing a modern, sculptural aesthetic. The overall form suggests a dynamic, upright posture, as if the figure is striding or standing with intent.
description: An abstract, angular adult human figure with sharp, metallic planes and a dynamic, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular torso and intersecting planes, with a prominent vertical structure and sharp edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated limbs and the extended, geometric form of the lower body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the faceted back and the tapering structure of the legs, with minimal anatomical detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the sharp, metallic planes and the dynamic, forward-leaning posture.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract sculptural form with no discernible clothing
